title: Hakone and environs after 3I
wikitext:
[]: Hakone and environs after 3I             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun May 05, 2013 9:57 am Tangent split by request; in response to http://forum.evageeks.org/post/626876/FanFiction-Requests-Recommendations-Discussion-etc/#626876 I dropped that one very early. It tripped all over a big pet peeve of mine, the far too common belief that any part of tokyo 3 or the geofront would still be around after 3I.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Sun May 05, 2013 10:18 am NemZ wrote: I dropped that one very early. It tripped all over a big pet peeve of mine, the far too common belief that any part of tokyo 3 or the geofront would still be around after 3I.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun May 05, 2013 10:23 am NemZ wrote: I dropped that one very early. It tripped all over a big pet peeve of mine, the far too common belief that any part of tokyo 3 or the geofront would still be around after 3I.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Sun May 05, 2013 10:30 am Bagheera wrote: But there's no reason for that, as they could just go to Gotenba or any other city in Japan and find all they need. The whole notion that 3I turned the world into a post-apocalyptic wasteland is wrong-headed.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun May 05, 2013 10:37 am Stillborn wrote: I was not implying that it wasted whole world. But we don't know how exactly healed are Asuka's wounds. How much strengh she have now. Shinji also isn't exactly a trooper material. Without ruins of Tokyo to scavenge food from, they may not have enough strengh to reach any other settlement on foot.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun May 05, 2013 10:40 am NemZ wrote: I dropped that one very early. It tripped all over a big pet peeve of mine, the far too common belief that any part of tokyo 3 or the geofront would still be around after 3I.

[]:             Quote Post by Stillborn » Sun May 05, 2013 10:51 am Bagheera wrote: That's why I mentioned Gotemba. It's literally right next door. If Asuka can tromp around fighting wolves for two years she can sure as heck hoof it to a proper city that's within spitting distance of Misato's apartment.

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Sun May 05, 2013 11:00 am Kendrix wrote: What does perplex me is why she didn't just eat them.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun May 05, 2013 11:09 am Kendrix wrote: Also, I thought the wolf-hunting was awesome....

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun May 05, 2013 12:20 pm Bagheera wrote: they've been extinct in Japan since the Meiji era anyway

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun May 05, 2013 1:58 pm Bagheera wrote: Also, no one else came back.

[]:             Quote Post by amitakartok » Sun May 05, 2013 2:35 pm This one doesn't. At least, in the sense of Asuka not miraculously getting over all that happened. She was supposed to get along with Shinji to prevent 3I from happening again, yet she does the almost exact opposite due to how well and truly broken she herself is by her experiences. It's one of the most realistic Peggy Sues I've ever seen.

[]:             Quote Post by gorgeousshutin » Mon May 06, 2013 2:55 pm View Original Post Bagheera wrote: That's why I mentioned Gotemba. It's literally right next door. If Asuka can tromp around fighting wolves for two years she can sure as heck hoof it to a proper city that's within spitting distance of Misato's apartment.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon May 06, 2013 3:01 pm gorgeousshutin wrote: But is Gotemba still shown to be a functional city in NGE verse, where many known populated areas had since gone defunct after Second Impact?

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Mon May 06, 2013 3:03 pm Bagheera wrote: Except that EoE establishes quite clearly that they do come back, and almost immediately at that.

[]:             Quote Post by gorgeousshutin » Mon May 06, 2013 4:31 pm Except that EoE establishes quite clearly that they do come back, and almost immediately at that.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 06, 2013 4:43 pm Stillborn wrote: I'm not that good with geography of Japan, so I couldn't tell. But if [Gotenba]'s as close as you say, it may have been wiped out as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon May 06, 2013 5:19 pm Silly Tines, it's going in the other direction!

[]:             Quote Post by Lavinius » Mon May 06, 2013 5:20 pm They're... very spiritual trees.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Mon May 06, 2013 6:09 pm NemZ wrote: I dropped that one very early. It tripped all over a big pet peeve of mine, the far too common belief that any part of tokyo 3 or the geofront would still be around after 3I.

It tripped all over a big pet peeve of mine, the far too common belief that any part of tokyo 3 or the geofront would still be around after 3I.
